summary: Iteration 5 verification complete. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass — health, copilot suggested prompts, chat 404/history, job flow with WATSONX error surfaced, demo endpoint (14 sections), demo fetch, refine unknown section 400, refine known section 502. Frontend: hero-cta-demo navigates to /results/{id}; all 12 section-* testids render; open-copilot navigates to /copilot/{id}; copilot-page, chat-input, chat-send present with 9 suggestion buttons; chat history is empty on load. Rebrand clean (no aicte/edunet/internship/student/academic on /, /create, /results, /copilot). Black+gold theme confirmed: body bg rgb(10,10,10), gold color rgb(252,211,77) used, 'AI' rendered with gold-text class in logo. health-error banner NOT visible on Create or Results (health OK).

minor.issue: When WATSONX_API_KEY blank, tenacity retries push latency past Cloudflare edge timeout (~100s), so the client can receive a Cloudflare HTML 502 instead of the FastAPI 502 JSON {detail: 'Refine failed: ...'}. Status is still 502 but detail JSON is lost. Consider disabling retries when the exception is a config error (WATSONX_API_KEY missing) so the FastAPI JSON error is returned promptly.

action_items: (Optional/minor) In watsonx_client.py, short-circuit tenacity retries on RuntimeError('WATSONX_API_KEY is not configured') so refine returns FastAPI 502 JSON quickly instead of hitting Cloudflare edge timeout. Not user-facing until a Refine UI exists that surfaces the detail.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py refine_section reads full blueprint doc then does $set on one section — good, avoids overwriting other sections.
demo_data.py is fully deterministic and includes all 14 keys aligned with ALL_AGENTS — safe for UI regression forever.
Refine endpoint retries via tenacity even for config errors — costs time and surfaces edge-layer 502s in browsers.
seed_data_creation: Each POST /api/blueprint/demo creates a fresh blueprint doc; tests created a few 'SprintDeck' rows in db.blueprints — harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WATSONX_API_KEY still blank. Use POST /api/blueprint/demo to seed a fully-populated blueprint for any Results / Copilot UI regression. Do NOT try to send an actual chat message from copilot UI — watsonx will fail. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (11 tests, ~22s).
rca of the issue: All bug-fix expectations from iteration 4 remain intact (informative error toast on generate). New capabilities (demo endpoint + section refine + black+gold rebrand) confirmed working end-to-end via Playwright.
